name: /standards-add: per G-9 sync, also auto-scaffolds the source-folder file (generated-code-quality-standards/<inferred-namespace>/<id>.yaml)
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro tree && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/standards-add.sh" https://my.com/guide --id my-guide --tier 1 --applies-to typescript --tree "$PWD/tree" && [ -f tree/my/my-guide.yaml ] && echo ok 1>&2
